suite.name: Practicetestautomation

test.name: Valid Login Test

kw.name: Open Homepage
Open Browser
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Open Browser' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Open Browser' found.
No keyword with name 'Open Browser' found.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Close Browser' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Close Browser' found.

test.doc: Test valid login with correct credentials.
test.status:
No keyword with name 'Open Browser' found.
Also teardown failed: No keyword with name 'Close Browser' found.

test.name: Invalid Username Login Test

Open Browser

test.doc: Test login with a correct username but incorrect password.

No keyword with name 'Open Browser' found.
Also teardown failed: No keyword with name 'Close Browser' found.

suite.doc: A complete test suite for web login on Practice Test Automation.

suite.name: Restful Booker

kw.name: Run Keywords
Load Environment Variables
Load Environment Variables As Suite Variables
kw.msg: Loaded 12 environment variables from Excel for ENV='DEV'
kw.doc: Load all environment variables from Excel and set them as Robot Framework Suite Variables so they are available across all test cases in the suite.

kw.name: Log Environment Summary
kw.msg: ENV = DEV XLSX = C:\Vinodh\Work\Pythonbase\Robot Framework\data\TestData.xlsx Variables: BASE_URL = http://sampleapp.tricentis.com/ BROWSER = chromium HEADLESS = false API_URL = https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com API_USERNAME = admin API_PASSWORD = *** LOGIN_URL = https://testautomationpractice.blogspot.com/ APP_USERNAME = admin APP_PASSWORD = *** TIMEOUT = 30 RETRY_COUNT = 2 SCREENSHOT_ON_FAIL = true
kw.doc: Log a summary of all loaded environment variables (masks passwords).
Read all keys from the Environments sheet in TestData.xlsx for the active ENV and expose them as Suite Variables. Call this in Suite Setup of every test suite.

kw.name: Authenticate as Admin
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
POST to /auth with API_USERNAME / API_PASSWORD from Excel and store the token as a suite variable.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.name: Get Bookings from Restful Booker
test.doc: Retrieve booking list and spot-check first 3 items.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'POST' found.

test.name: Create a Booking at Restful Booker
test.doc: POST a new booking and verify it was persisted.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'POST' found.

test.name: Delete Booking
test.doc: Delete the booking created in the previous test.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'POST' found.

suite.doc: Restful Booker API tests — base URL and credentials are loaded from data/TestData.xlsx via env.resource. Run with: --variable ENV:DEV (default) --variable ENV:QA --variable ENV:PROD
suite.status: Suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'POST' found.

suite.name: sp BDD

kw.name: Load Environment Variables
Load Environment Variables As Suite Variables
kw.msg: Loaded 12 environment variables from Excel for ENV='DEV'
kw.doc: Load all environment variables from Excel and set them as Robot Framework Suite Variables so they are available across all test cases in the suite.

kw.name: Log Environment Summary
kw.msg: ENV = DEV XLSX = C:\Vinodh\Work\Pythonbase\Robot Framework\data\TestData.xlsx Variables: BASE_URL = http://sampleapp.tricentis.com/ BROWSER = chromium HEADLESS = false API_URL = https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com API_USERNAME = admin API_PASSWORD = *** LOGIN_URL = https://testautomationpractice.blogspot.com/ APP_USERNAME = admin APP_PASSWORD = *** TIMEOUT = 30 RETRY_COUNT = 2 SCREENSHOT_ON_FAIL = true
kw.doc: Log a summary of all loaded environment variables (masks passwords).
Read all keys from the Environments sheet in TestData.xlsx for the active ENV and expose them as Suite Variables. Call this in Suite Setup of every test suite.

test.name: Login With Admin

kw.name: Given I am on the login page
Log To Console
kw.arg: I am on the login page
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: When I login with username "${APP_USERNAME}" and password "${APP_PASSWORD}"
kw.source_name: I login with username "${username}" and password "${password}"

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: I login with username "${username}" and password "${password}"
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Then I should see the welcome page
Log To Console
kw.arg: I should see the welcome page
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

test.doc: Verify successful login with valid admin credentials from Excel.

test.name: Login With Invalid User

kw.name: Given I am on the login page
Log To Console
kw.arg: I am on the login page
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: When I login with username "invalid" and password "invalid"
kw.source_name: I login with username "${username}" and password "${password}"

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: I login with username "${username}" and password "${password}"
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Then I should see the error message
Log To Console
kw.arg: I should see the error message
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: And I should be able to login again
Log To Console
kw.arg: I should be able to login again
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.doc: Verify login fails and shows error with invalid credentials.

suite.doc: BDD-style login tests driven by credentials from data/TestData.xlsx. Environment is selected at runtime via --variable ENV:DEV|QA|PROD.

suite.name: Testautomationpractice

kw.name: Load Environment Variables
Load Environment Variables As Suite Variables
kw.msg: Loaded 12 environment variables from Excel for ENV='DEV'
kw.doc: Load all environment variables from Excel and set them as Robot Framework Suite Variables so they are available across all test cases in the suite.

kw.name: Log Environment Summary
kw.msg: ENV = DEV XLSX = C:\Vinodh\Work\Pythonbase\Robot Framework\data\TestData.xlsx Variables: BASE_URL = http://sampleapp.tricentis.com/ BROWSER = chromium HEADLESS = false API_URL = https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com API_USERNAME = admin API_PASSWORD = *** LOGIN_URL = https://testautomationpractice.blogspot.com/ APP_USERNAME = admin APP_PASSWORD = *** TIMEOUT = 30 RETRY_COUNT = 2 SCREENSHOT_ON_FAIL = true
kw.doc: Log a summary of all loaded environment variables (masks passwords).
Read all keys from the Environments sheet in TestData.xlsx for the active ENV and expose them as Suite Variables. Call this in Suite Setup of every test suite.

test.name: My First Test

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.doc: Basic smoke test — logs a message.

test.name: Create A Random String

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: We are going to generate a random string
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: We finished generating a random string
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.doc: Generate and log a random 10-character string.

suite.doc: Practice test automation — LOGIN_URL and BROWSER are loaded from data/TestData.xlsx via env.resource.

suite.name: Vehicle Insurance App

kw.name: Run Keywords
Load Environment Variables
Load Environment Variables As Suite Variables
kw.msg: Loaded 12 environment variables from Excel for ENV='DEV'
kw.doc: Load all environment variables from Excel and set them as Robot Framework Suite Variables so they are available across all test cases in the suite.

kw.name: Log Environment Summary
kw.msg: ENV = DEV XLSX = C:\Vinodh\Work\Pythonbase\Robot Framework\data\TestData.xlsx Variables: BASE_URL = http://sampleapp.tricentis.com/ BROWSER = chromium HEADLESS = false API_URL = https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com API_USERNAME = admin API_PASSWORD = *** LOGIN_URL = https://testautomationpractice.blogspot.com/ APP_USERNAME = admin APP_PASSWORD = *** TIMEOUT = 30 RETRY_COUNT = 2 SCREENSHOT_ON_FAIL = true
kw.doc: Log a summary of all loaded environment variables (masks passwords).
Read all keys from the Environments sheet in TestData.xlsx for the active ENV and expose them as Suite Variables. Call this in Suite Setup of every test suite.

kw.name: Open Insurance Application
New Browser
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'New Browser' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'New Browser' found.

kw.doc: Launch the browser and navigate to the insurance app URL from Excel.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'New Browser' found.

kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'New Browser' found.

test.name: Create Quote for Car
test.doc: End-to-end quote creation for the Automobile vehicle type.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'New Browser' found.

suite.doc: Vehicle Insurance UI tests — browser, URL and credentials are loaded from data/TestData.xlsx via env.resource. Run with: --variable ENV:DEV (default) --variable ENV:QA --variable ENV:PROD
suite.status: Suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'New Browser' found.
